title: Character & Word Frequency Analyzer
description: Analyze character and word frequency in text with ranked bar charts. Switch between character and word frequency. Free online tool.
placeholder: Type or paste text to analyze...
noData: No data found. Try adjusting the filter options.

howToUse.label: Enter your text
howToUse.description: Type or paste the text you want to analyze. The frequency ranking updates instantly.

howToUse.label: Switch between character and word frequency
howToUse.description: Character frequency shows how often each character appears. Word frequency counts occurrences of each word.

howToUse.label: Filter and explore the ranking
howToUse.description: Use the options to exclude spaces or punctuation. Top 20 are shown by default; click 'Show more' to see all.

faq.question: How do I find the most common words in my text?
faq.answer: Switch to the 'Word Frequency' tab. Words are counted in a case-insensitive way and ranked from most to least frequent.

faq.question: How accurate is word frequency for Japanese text?
faq.answer: Word splitting uses Unicode character classes (\p{L}) without morphological analysis. English splits accurately on spaces; Japanese results are approximate since word boundaries are ambiguous without a tokenizer.

faq.question: How do I exclude spaces and punctuation from the results?
faq.answer: Check 'Exclude spaces' to remove whitespace characters, and 'Exclude punctuation' to remove symbols and punctuation marks. Both can be enabled simultaneously.

faq.question: What can I use this tool for?
faq.answer: Common uses: checking if you overuse certain words in English writing, finding frequent kanji in Japanese text, and analyzing text patterns for linguistic research.

faq.question: Is my text sent to a server?
faq.answer: No. All analysis runs entirely in your browser. Your text is never sent to any external server.
